name: Forest Wing
description: Forest Wing is a hyper-casual butterfly flying game. Guide your butterfly through ancient forest tree trunks, collect golden seeds, and survive as long as possible! Features 5 unlockable butterfly skins, Classic and Lightning (30-second sprint) modes, XP progression with 11 levels, 7-day daily streak bonuses, 8 achievements, seasonal visual themes (Halloween, Winter, Spring, Summer, Forest), and an interactive tutorial for new players.
instructions: Tap or click to flap your butterfly wings and fly up Release to glide down Fly through the gap between the tree trunks without touching them Collect golden seeds for bonus points and combo multipliers Earn seeds to unlock new butterfly skins in the sh
